file.content:
class Autocompletable::UsersController < ApplicationController
  def index
    set_page_and_extract_portion_from find_autocompletable_users.with_attached_avatar.ordered, per_page: 20
  end

  private
    def find_autocompletable_users
      params[:query].present? ? users_scope.active.filtered_by(params[:query]) : users_scope.active
    end

    def users_scope
      params[:room_id].present? ? Current.user.rooms.find(params[:room_id]).users : User.all
    end
end

file.content:
class User < ApplicationRecord
  include Avatar, Bannable, Bot, Mentionable, Role, Transferable

  has_many :memberships, dependent: :delete_all
  has_many :rooms, through: :memberships

  has_many :reachable_messages, through: :rooms, source: :messages
  has_many :messages, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :creator_id

  has_many :push_subscriptions, class_name: "Push::Subscription", dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :boosts, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :booster_id
  has_many :searches, dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :sessions, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :bans, dependent: :destroy

  enum :status, %i[ active deactivated banned ], default: :active

  has_secure_password validations: false

  after_create_commit :grant_membership_to_open_rooms

  scope :ordered, -> { order("LOWER(name)") }
  scope :filtered_by, ->(query) { where("name like ?", "%#{query}%") }

  def initials
    name.scan(/\b\w/).join
  end

  def title
    [ name, bio ].compact_blank.join(" – ")
  end

  def deactivate
    transaction do
      close_remote_connections

      memberships.without_direct_rooms.delete_all
      push_subscriptions.delete_all
      searches.delete_all
      sessions.delete_all

      update! status: :deactivated, email_address: deactived_email_address
    end
  end

  def reset_remote_connections
    close_remote_connections reconnect: true
  end

  private
    def grant_membership_to_open_rooms
      Membership.insert_all(Rooms::Open.pluck(:id).collect { |room_id| { room_id: room_id, user_id: id } })
    end

    def deactived_email_address
      email_address&.gsub(/@/, "-deactivated-#{SecureRandom.uuid}@")
    end

    def close_remote_connections(reconnect: false)
      ActionCable.server.remote_connections.where(current_user: self).disconnect reconnect: reconnect
    end
end

class User < ApplicationRecord
  include Avatar, Bannable, Bot, Mentionable, Role, Transferable

  has_many :memberships, dependent: :delete_all
  has_many :rooms, through: :memberships

  has_many :reachable_messages, through: :rooms, source: :messages
  has_many :messages, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :creator_id

  has_many :push_subscriptions, class_name: "Push::Subscription", dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :boosts, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :booster_id
  has_many :searches, dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :sessions, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :bans, dependent: :destroy

  enum :status, %i[ active deactivated banned ], default: :active

  has_secure_password validations: false

  after_create_commit :grant_membership_to_open_rooms

  scope :ordered, -> { order("LOWER(name)") }
  scope :filtered_by, ->(query) { where("name like ?", "%#{query}%") }

  def initials
    name.scan(/\b\w/).join
  end

  def title
    [ name, bio ].compact_blank.join(" – ")
  end

  def deactivate
    transaction do
      close_remote_connections

      memberships.without_direct_rooms.delete_all
      push_subscriptions.delete_all
      searches.delete_all
      sessions.delete_all

      update! status: :deactivated, email_address: deactived_email_address
    end
  end

  def reset_remote_connections
    close_remote_connections reconnect: true
  end

  private
    def grant_membership_to_open_rooms
      Membership.insert_all(Rooms::Open.pluck(:id).collect { |room_id| { room_id: room_id, user_id: id } })
    end

    def deactived_email_address
      email_address&.gsub(/@/, "-deactivated-#{SecureRandom.uuid}@")
    end

    def close_remote_connections(reconnect: false)
      ActionCable.server.remote_connections.where(current_user: self).disconnect reconnect: reconnect
    end
end

input.new_string:
private
    def find_autocompletable_users
      scope = params[:query].present? ? users_scope.active.filtered_by(params[:query]) : users_scope.active
      params[:except].present? ? scope.excluding(excepted_user_ids) : scope
    end

    def users_scope
      params[:room_id].present? ? Current.user.rooms.find(params[:room_id]).users : User.all
    end

    def excepted_user_ids
      Array(params[:except]).flat_map { |ids| ids.to_s.split(",") }
    end

file.content:
require "test_helper"

class Autocompletable::UsersControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "search results escape HTML in names" do
    users(:david).update!(name: "David <script>alert(123)</script>")

    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David <script>alert(123)</script>", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:hq).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search is scoped by membership" do
    sign_in :kevin

    assert_not_includes users(:kevin).rooms, rooms(:watercooler)

    assert_raises ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound do
      get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:watercooler).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }
    end
  end
end

content.text: I'll add tests covering the `except` parameter for both array and comma-separated forms, and for room-scoped autocomplete.

input.old_string:
test "room search is scoped by membership" do
    sign_in :kevin

    assert_not_includes users(:kevin).rooms, rooms(:watercooler)

    assert_raises ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound do
      get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:watercooler).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }
    end
  end
end
input.new_string:
test "room search is scoped by membership" do
    sign_in :kevin

    assert_not_includes users(:kevin).rooms, rooms(:watercooler)

    assert_raises ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound do
      get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:watercooler).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }
    end
  end

  test "search excludes users given as an array of ids" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da", except: [ users(:david).id ] }

    assert_response :success
    assert_not_includes response.parsed_body.map { |user| user["id"] }, users(:david).id
  end

  test "search excludes users given as a comma-separated list of ids" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da", except: users(:david).id.to_s }

    assert_response :success
    assert_not_includes response.parsed_body.map { |user| user["id"] }, users(:david).id
  end

  test "room search excludes users given in except" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:hq).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da", except: [ users(:david).id ] }

    assert_response :success
    assert_not_includes response.parsed_body.map { |user| user["id"] }, users(:david).id
  end
end

require "test_helper"

class Autocompletable::UsersControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "search results escape HTML in names" do
    users(:david).update!(name: "David <script>alert(123)</script>")

    get autocompletable_users_url(format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David <script>alert(123)</script>", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search returns matching users" do
    get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:hq).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }

    assert_response :success
    assert_equal "David", response.parsed_body.first["name"]
  end

  test "room search is scoped by membership" do
    sign_in :kevin

    assert_not_includes users(:kevin).rooms, rooms(:watercooler)

    assert_raises ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound do
      get autocompletable_users_url(room_id: rooms(:watercooler).id, format: :json), params: { query: "da" }
    end
  end
end

content.content: The file /Users/sal/Projects/ctxpack/tmp/tier2-expansion/campfire/workspaces/t2-1-treatment-3/app/models/user.rb has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

tool_use_result.originalFile:
class User < ApplicationRecord
  include Avatar, Bannable, Bot, Mentionable, Role, Transferable

  has_many :memberships, dependent: :delete_all
  has_many :rooms, through: :memberships

  has_many :reachable_messages, through: :rooms, source: :messages
  has_many :messages, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :creator_id

  has_many :push_subscriptions, class_name: "Push::Subscription", dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :boosts, dependent: :destroy, foreign_key: :booster_id
  has_many :searches, dependent: :delete_all

  has_many :sessions, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :bans, dependent: :destroy

  enum :status, %i[ active deactivated banned ], default: :active

  has_secure_password validations: false

  after_create_commit :grant_membership_to_open_rooms

  scope :ordered, -> { order("LOWER(name)") }
  scope :filtered_by, ->(query) { where("name like ?", "%#{query}%") }
  scope :excluding, ->(users) { where.not(id: users) }

  def initials
    name.scan(/\b\w/).join
  end

  def title
    [ name, bio ].compact_blank.join(" – ")
  end

  def deactivate
    transaction do
      close_remote_connections

      memberships.without_direct_rooms.delete_all
      push_subscriptions.delete_all
      searches.delete_all
      sessions.delete_all

      update! status: :deactivated, email_address: deactived_email_address
    end
  end

  def reset_remote_connections
    close_remote_connections reconnect: true
  end

  private
    def grant_membership_to_open_rooms
      Membership.insert_all(Rooms::Open.pluck(:id).collect { |room_id| { room_id: room_id, user_id: id } })
    end

    def deactived_email_address
      email_address&.gsub(/@/, "-deactivated-#{SecureRandom.uuid}@")
    end

    def close_remote_connections(reconnect: false)
      ActionCable.server.remote_connections.where(current_user: self).disconnect reconnect: reconnect
    end
end

tool_use_result.originalFile:
class Autocompletable::UsersController < ApplicationController
  def index
    set_page_and_extract_portion_from find_autocompletable_users.with_attached_avatar.ordered, per_page: 20
  end

  private
    def find_autocompletable_users
      scope = params[:query].present? ? users_scope.active.filtered_by(params[:query]) : users_scope.active
      params[:except].present? ? scope.excluding(excepted_user_ids) : scope
    end

    def users_scope
      params[:room_id].present? ? Current.user.rooms.find(params[:room_id]).users : User.all
    end

    def excepted_user_ids
      Array(params[:except]).flat_map { |ids| ids.to_s.split(",") }
    end
end

content.text: Confirmed pre-existing (unrelated to this change, missing local ffmpeg/jpeg-xl codec library on this machine). The full suite otherwise passes: 247/248, 0 failures, 1 pre-existing error.

**Summary of changes** (uncommitted in working tree, as requested):

- `app/models/user.rb`: added `scope :excluding_ids, ->(ids) { where.not(id: ids) }` (named `excluding_ids` rather than `excluding` since that collides with an existing ActiveRecord class method).
- `app/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller.rb`: `find_autocompletable_users` now applies `.excluding_ids(excepted_user_ids)` when `params[:except]` is present; `excepted_user_ids` normalizes the param via `Array(params[:except]).flat_map { |ids| ids.to_s.split(",") }`, so it works whether `except` arrives as an array of IDs or a comma-separated string (or a mix). Exclusion is applied after `users_scope` (which already handles the room-scoped vs. global case), so it covers both ordinary and room-scoped autocomplete.
- `test/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller_test.rb`: added 3 tests — array-form exclusion, comma-separated-string exclusion, and room-scoped exclusion.

**Proof**:
- `bin/rails test test/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller_test.rb` → `7 runs, 26 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skips`.
- Full suite `bin/rails test` → `248 runs, 724 assertions, 0 failures, 1 errors`. The 1 error (`Message::AttachmentTest#test_creating_a_message_creates_video_preview`) is a pre-existing local-environment issue (missing `libjxl` dylib for `ffprobe`), verified to occur identically on a clean stash of `main` — unrelated to this change.
- No compiler/packet-generation code was touched, so no Tier 0 corpus rescan applies here.

result:
**Summary of changes** (uncommitted in working tree, as requested):

- `app/models/user.rb`: added `scope :excluding_ids, ->(ids) { where.not(id: ids) }` (named `excluding_ids` rather than `excluding` since that collides with an existing ActiveRecord class method).
- `app/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller.rb`: `find_autocompletable_users` now applies `.excluding_ids(excepted_user_ids)` when `params[:except]` is present; `excepted_user_ids` normalizes the param via `Array(params[:except]).flat_map { |ids| ids.to_s.split(",") }`, so it works whether `except` arrives as an array of IDs or a comma-separated string (or a mix). Exclusion is applied after `users_scope` (which already handles the room-scoped vs. global case), so it covers both ordinary and room-scoped autocomplete.
- `test/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller_test.rb`: added 3 tests — array-form exclusion, comma-separated-string exclusion, and room-scoped exclusion.

**Proof**:
- `bin/rails test test/controllers/autocompletable/users_controller_test.rb` → `7 runs, 26 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skips`.
- Full suite `bin/rails test` → `248 runs, 724 assertions, 0 failures, 1 errors`. The 1 error (`Message::AttachmentTest#test_creating_a_message_creates_video_preview`) is a pre-existing local-environment issue (missing `libjxl` dylib for `ffprobe`), verified to occur identically on a clean stash of `main` — unrelated to this change.
- No compiler/packet-generation code was touched, so no Tier 0 corpus rescan applies here.
